description: Refactor the 'payment-processor' legacy project to replace integer magic constants in PaymentConstants.java with a type-safe Java Enum. Create a new enum com.payments.model.PaymentType containing constants CREDIT_CARD (0.029 fee rate, "Credit Card"), DEBIT_CARD (0.015 fee rate, "Debit Card"), BANK_TRANSFER (0.005 fee rate, "Bank Transfer"), and DIGITAL_WALLET (0.025 fee rate, "Digital Wallet"). The enum must implement abstract methods getFeeRate() and getDisplayName() to return these values. Refactor PaymentProcessor, FeeCalculator, PaymentValidator, PaymentReport, and PaymentProcessorTest to utilize this Enum instead of integers, and remove the obsolete PaymentConstants definitions. The final project must compile and pass all 8 tests.
